name: Slider
description: Single-value input control for selecting a numeric value from a bounded range using pointer or keyboard interaction.

decimalPlaces.description: Number of decimal places used when clamping and rounding values.

restrictToMarks.description: Restricts selectable values to mark values and ignores `step`.

showTicks.description: Shows tick marks above mark labels.

showTooltip.description: Shows value tooltip while hovering, dragging, or focusing thumb.

accessibleMinText.description: Accessible text announced for minimum label context.

accessibleMaxText.description: Accessible text announced for maximum label context.

constrainLabelPosition.description: Constrains min/max labels to remain inside track boundaries.

format.description: Formats values for tooltip, labels, and `aria-valuetext`.

onChange.description: Called when value changes during pointer or keyboard interaction.

onChangeEnd.description: Called when keyboard/pointer-driven value updates are committed.

aria-label.description: Accessible name for the slider thumb input when no external label is provided.

aria-labelledby.description: References element IDs that label the slider.

aria-valuetext.description: Accessible textual representation of current value.

slots.none: Slider has no consumer-facing slots; structure is internally composed of track and thumb.

keyboard: Tab: move focus to slider thumb / continue tab order
Shift+Tab: move focus to previous tabbable element
ArrowUp / ArrowRight: increase by step (or next mark when `restrictToMarks` is true)
ArrowDown / ArrowLeft: decrease by step (or previous mark when `restrictToMarks` is true)
Home: set to minimum allowed value
End: set to maximum allowed value
aria: Provide accessible name via `aria-label`, `aria-labelledby`, or associated FormField label
`aria-valuenow`, `aria-valuemin`, and `aria-valuemax` are set on internal range input
Use `aria-valuetext` and/or `format` when displayed value is non-numeric or domain-specific
